_Note: ENGLISH IEL9.0 - Đảo ngữ và Rút gọn Mệnh đề
topic: Đảo ngữ và Rút gọn Mệnh đề
subject: ENGLISH IEL9.0

questions.question: **______** the meeting finished when the board received an unexpected call from the auditor.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc No sooner... than (Vừa mới... thì): No sooner + had + S + V3/ed + than + S + V2/ed. Context: Sự kiện kết thúc (finished) xảy ra ngay trước sự kiện nhận cuộc gọi (received).

questions.question: **______** been a decline in productivity that the management decided to restructure the entire department.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj/Adv + V + S + that. 'Has been' là hiện tại hoàn thành, nên cần 'So dramatic has'.

questions.question: Never in his career **______** faced such intense scrutiny from the international press.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Never/Never before: Never + Aux + S + V. Context: 'has faced' (Hiện tại hoàn thành) phù hợp nhất với hành động kéo dài đến hiện tại.

questions.question: Not only **______** the proposed tax cuts, but they also introduced new levies on luxury goods.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not only: Not only + Aux + S + V + but (also)... Context: 'rejected' (Quá khứ đơn) nên cần 'did... reject'.

questions.question: **______** was the pressure on the CEO that he offered his resignation immediately after the scandal broke.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. 'intense' là tính từ đi với 'was'.

questions.question: Rarely **______** of economic growth without accompanying environmental degradation.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Rarely: Rarely + Aux + S + V. 'speak' là V1 nên cần trợ động từ 'do'.

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** the confidential documents to any unauthorized personnel.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Under no circumstances: Under no circumstances + Aux + S + V. Cần trợ động từ 'must'.

questions.question: Only after the final audit report was published **______** the full extent of the financial irregularities.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only after: Only after + Clause + Aux + S + V. Cần trợ động từ 'did' cho quá khứ đơn (realized).

questions.question: Little **______** that the seemingly minor technical glitch would lead to a complete system failure.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Little: Little + Aux + S + V. Cần trợ động từ 'did' (thì quá khứ đơn).

questions.question: **______** had the project commenced than the initial budget projections were deemed inadequate.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc No sooner... than (Vừa mới... thì).

questions.question: Nowhere **______** been a more concentrated effort to achieve carbon neutrality than in this region.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Nowhere: Nowhere + Aux + S + V. Cần Hiện tại hoàn thành ('has been') với chủ ngữ giả 'there'.

questions.question: Should the data prove inconclusive, **______** the experiment immediately.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 1 (Should): Should + S + V (nguyên mẫu) + Clause. Mệnh đề chính không đảo ngữ: S + V.

questions.question: Only then **______** the true gravity of the diplomatic situation.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only then: Only then + Aux + S + V. Cần trợ động từ 'did' cho quá khứ đơn (grasped).

questions.question: Not until the final evidence was presented **______** the judge alter his preliminary ruling.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not until: Not until + Clause + Aux + S + V. 'alter' là V1 nên cần trợ động từ 'did' (thì quá khứ).

questions.question: **______** the adverse market reaction that the company decided to delay its IPO indefinitely.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. S là 'the adverse market reaction' (số ít) nên cần 'was'.

questions.question: Rarely **______** the board members show such a unified front on a contentious issue.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Rarely: Rarely + Aux + S + V. 'show' là V1 nên cần trợ động từ 'do' (thì hiện tại đơn).

questions.question: Only with persistent political pressure **______** the government agree to revise the proposed legislation.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only: Only + giới từ/cụm từ + Aux + S + V. 'agree' là V1 nên cần 'did'.

questions.question: So pervasive **______** the data inconsistencies that the entire study was invalidated.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. S là 'the data inconsistencies' (số nhiều) nên cần 'were'.

questions.question: **______** was the intensity of the earthquake that the town was completely demolished.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. 'great' là tính từ đi với 'was'.

questions.question: On no account **______** authorized personnel be granted access to the classified servers.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với On no account: On no account + Aux + S + V. 'should' là trợ động từ chuẩn thể hiện sự bắt buộc/cấm đoán.

questions.question: Not for a moment **______** the CEO realize the true gravity of the market downturn.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not for a moment: Not for a moment + Aux + S + V. 'realize' là V1 nên cần 'did'.

questions.question: Should you require any further assistance, **______** free to contact our dedicated support team.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 1 (Should): Should + S + V (nguyên mẫu) + Clause. Mệnh đề chính là mệnh lệnh, nên không đảo ngữ và bắt đầu bằng V1 (feel).

questions.question: **______** had the merger been announced when the stock price immediately began to decline.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Barely/Hardly/Scarcely... when (Vừa mới... thì).

questions.question: In no other country **______** such a complex system of checks and balances on governmental power.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với In no other: In no other + Noun + Aux + S + V. Cần trợ động từ 'does' và chủ ngữ giả 'there'.

questions.question: Not only **______** the initial findings, but they also added new experimental data.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not only: Not only + Aux + S + V + but (also)... Context: 'confirmed' (Quá khứ đơn) bị loại trừ vì lựa chọn C (Hiện tại hoàn thành) phổ biến hơn trong văn phong học thuật ('added' có thể là sự kiện đã xảy ra).

questions.question: **______** were the negotiations proceeding that the diplomat requested a sudden recess to consult his government.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adv + V + S + that. 'were the negotiations proceeding' (Qúa khứ tiếp diễn) cần trạng từ 'swiftly'.

questions.question: No sooner **______** the agreement than the opposing faction immediately voiced their objections.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc No sooner... than: No sooner + had + S + V3/ed.

questions.question: **______** was the complexity of the philosophical concept that it required an entire chapter of elucidation.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ với Such: Such + V + Noun Phrase (the complexity...).

questions.question: Hardly **______** the government implemented the new policy when public protests erupted across the capital.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Hardly/Barely/Scarcely... when/before: Hardly + had + S + V3/ed.

questions.question: Never before **______** such a high level of economic disparity in the region.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Never before: Never before + Aux + S + V. Cần Hiện tại hoàn thành (have observed) để chỉ sự kiện lần đầu xảy ra tính đến hiện tại.

questions.question: Only by presenting irrefutable empirical data **______** the scientific community accept the contentious new theory.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only by: Only by + V-ing/Noun + Aux + S + V. Cần 'could' (quá khứ) vì 'accept' là V1.

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** the company breach the terms of the confidentiality agreement.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Under no circumstances: Under no circumstances + Aux + S + V. 'should' là trợ động từ chuẩn thể hiện sự bắt buộc/cấm đoán.

questions.question: Little **______** that the seemingly benevolent dictator would unleash such a reign of terror.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Little: Little + Aux + S + V. Cần 'did' (quá khứ đơn).

questions.question: **______** had the delegates reached a consensus when the diplomatic envoy collapsed from exhaustion.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Scarcely... when (Vừa mới... thì).

questions.question: Were the company to face mass litigation, **______** severe financial consequences.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 2 (Were): Were + S + to + V (nguyên mẫu) + Clause. Mệnh đề chính không đảo ngữ: S + would + V.

questions.question: Nowhere in the historical record **______** a clearer description of the event.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Nowhere: Nowhere + Aux + S + V. Cần trợ động từ 'can' (khả năng).

questions.question: **______** were the philosophical concepts that the professor had to spend three lectures on elucidation alone.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. S là 'the philosophical concepts' (số nhiều) nên cần 'were'.

questions.question: Not until the final vote was tallied **______** the true power dynamic within the city council.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not until: Not until + Clause + Aux + S + V. Cần 'did' cho quá khứ đơn (understood).

questions.question: Not only **______** the proposal on its merits, but they also condemned the rationale behind it.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not only: Not only + Aux + S + V + but (also)... Cần 'did' cho quá khứ đơn (rejected).

questions.question: So dire **______** the economic situation that the government resorted to emergency austerity measures.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. S là 'the economic situation' (số ít) nên cần 'was'.

questions.question: Should the evidence be deemed insufficient, **______** the committee **______** the case without delay. (Đảo ngữ loại 1 - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 1 (Should): Should + S + V. Mệnh đề chính: S + V. Nếu thiếu Aux, cần Should + S + V1.

questions.question: **______** had the treaty been ratified **______** the opposing faction immediately voiced their objections. (Đảo ngữ kép với No sooner - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ: No sooner + had + S + V3/ed + than + S + V2/ed.

questions.question: Little **______** the political analyst **______** that his prediction would cause such widespread market volatility. (Đảo ngữ với Little - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Little: Little + did + S + V1.

questions.question: So pervasive **______** the data inconsistencies that the entire study was invalidated. (Đảo ngữ với So - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ là 'the data inconsistencies' (số nhiều) nên cần 'were'.

questions.question: Only after submitting the final report **______** the CEO **______** to disclose the ethical breach. (Đảo ngữ với Only after - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only after: Only after + Clause + Aux + S + V1.

questions.question: Never in the history of the country **______** been a more concerted effort to achieve consensus. (Đảo ngữ với Never - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Never: Never + Aux + S + V. Cần Hiện tại hoàn thành ('has been') với chủ ngữ giả 'there'.

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** employees **______** personal data on the company servers. (Đảo ngữ kép với Under no circumstances - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Under no circumstances: Should + S + V1 (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: Were the negotiations to fail, **______** the two nations **______** severe diplomatic repercussions. (Đảo ngữ loại 2 - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 2 (Were): Were + S + to + V. Mệnh đề chính không đảo ngữ: S + would + V.

questions.question: Rarely **______** the management **______** such extreme measures without consulting the board. (Đảo ngữ với Rarely - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Rarely: Rarely + Aux + S + V. 'management' (số ít) và 'take' (V1) nên cần 'does... take'.

questions.question: Scarcely **______** the committee **______** the decision when they realized their error. (Đảo ngữ kép với Scarcely - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Scarcely... when: Scarcely + had + S + V3/ed.

_Note: ENGLISH IEL9.0 - Rút gọn Mệnh đề và Giả định cách
topic: Rút gọn Mệnh đề và Giả định cách
subject: ENGLISH IEL9.0

questions.question: The committee recommended that the final draft **______** to external legal counsel for immediate review.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách (Subjunctive Mood) với động từ Recommended: recommend that S + V (nguyên mẫu)/be V3/ed.

questions.question: The technical report, **______** by the lead engineer, meticulously detailed the causes of the system failure.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The report, (which was) authored by the lead engineer.

questions.question: **______** from the political discourse, the highly sensitive issue was finally broached by the diplomat.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because it had long been omitted $\to$ Having long been omitted (Hoàn thành bị động).

questions.question: It is imperative that the new safety protocols **______** strictly adhered to by all personnel immediately.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is imperative that S + V (nguyên mẫu)/be V3/ed.

questions.question: The historical artifact, **______** in a remote Peruvian tomb, provided unprecedented insight into the ancient civilization.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The artifact, (which was) discovered in a remote tomb.

questions.question: The panel insisted that the financial data **______** transparently and without any obfuscation.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Insisted: insist that S + V (nguyên mẫu)/be V3/ed.

questions.question: **______** the economic situation had deteriorated significantly, the central bank decided to intervene with emergency measures.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): As the bank realized that $\to$ Realizing that (Chủ động).

questions.question: The philosophical concept, **______** by the professor in her latest monograph, remained highly recondite to the general audience.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The concept, (which was) elucidated by the professor.

questions.question: **______** all necessary approvals, the company proceeded with the construction of the new facility.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Thời gian): After they had obtained $\to$ Having obtained (Hoàn thành chủ động, nhấn mạnh hành động xảy ra trước).

questions.question: It is vital that the committee **______** any conflict of interest before proceeding with the tender selection.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is vital that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The proposed legislation, **______** by powerful lobby groups, faced immediate political opposition.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The legislation, (which was) supported by powerful lobby groups.

questions.question: **______** the contentious amendment, the government faced widespread public criticism for its abrupt change in policy.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Thời gian): After the government repealed $\to$ Having repealed (Hoàn thành chủ động).

questions.question: The research paper, **______** by its inherent bias, was swiftly retracted by the journal.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The paper, (which was) vitiated by its bias.

questions.question: The diplomat suggested that the two rival nations **______** a formal meeting to discuss rapprochement.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Suggested: suggest that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the economic disparity, the political system risks further social disintegration.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Điều kiện): If the system fails to address $\to$ Failing to address.

questions.question: The data, **______** by the lead analyst, clearly indicated a massive deficit.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The data, (which was) presented by the lead analyst.

questions.question: **______** all necessary precautions, the company still faced a major security breach.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nhượng bộ): Although they had taken $\to$ Having taken (Hoàn thành chủ động).

questions.question: It is essential that the evidence **______** strictly **______** to prevent any claims of prevarication.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is essential that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: The philosopher demanded that her core argument **______** by empirical facts before submission.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Demanded: demand that S + be + V3/ed.

questions.question: **______** the full gravity of the situation, the diplomat offered his immediate resignation.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because he understood $\to$ Understanding (Chủ động).

questions.question: The legal document, **______** by a single typo, was deemed inadmissible by the judge.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The document, (which was) vitiated by a typo.

questions.question: **______** the economic forecast, the central bank decided to hold an emergency session.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because the bank was alarmed by $\to$ Alarmed by (Bị động).

questions.question: The scientist urged that the laboratory protocols **______** rigorously **______** to ensure data integrity.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Urged: urge that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: The artifact, **______** to be of great antiquity, was immediately placed under national protection.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The artifact, (which was) judged to be of great antiquity.

questions.question: **______** the CEO’s complicity in the fraud, the board issued a formal censure.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Thời gian): After the board discovered $\to$ Having discovered (Hoàn thành chủ động).

questions.question: The final ruling required that the former executive **______** all company assets immediately.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Required: require that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the complexity of the political system, the average voter finds it difficult to ascertain the true power dynamic.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): As the complexity is given $\to$ Given the complexity.

questions.question: The politician insisted that the committee **______** its findings transparently and without delay.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Insisted: insist that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the economic hardship, the government still faced widespread criticism for its austere policies.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nhượng bộ): Although the policies mitigated $\to$ Mitigating the hardship (Chủ động).

questions.question: The company suggested that the defective product line **______** immediately **______** from the market.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Suggested: suggest that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: The document, **______** by a serious discrepancy, was deemed inadmissible in court.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The document, (which was) flawed by a serious discrepancy.

questions.question: **______** the proposal lacked empirical evidence, the academic board decided to withhold ratification.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): As they considered $\to$ Considering (Chủ động).

questions.question: It is desirable that the two nations **______** a framework for peaceful rapprochement immediately.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is desirable that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The old treaty, **______** after years of diplomatic negotiation, was finally abrogated.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The treaty, (which was) signed after years of negotiation.

questions.question: **______** the full severity of the impending crisis, the CEO resigned from the company.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because he realized $\to$ Realizing (Chủ động).

questions.question: The committee agreed that the new ethical guidelines **______** prominently **______** throughout the organization.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Agreed: agree that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** of all legal liability, the former executive was free to pursue new ventures.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): After he had been exonerated $\to$ Having been exonerated (Hoàn thành bị động, nhấn mạnh hành động xảy ra trước).

questions.question: The diplomat urged that the hostile rhetoric **______** immediately to prevent further escalation.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Urged: urge that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The document, **______** by a single ambiguous clause, required immediate amendment.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The document, (which was) vitiated by a clause.

questions.question: **______** the public trust, the politician offered his resignation in a brief, terse statement.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Thời gian): After he had lost $\to$ Having lost (Hoàn thành chủ động, nhấn mạnh hành động đã xảy ra và kết thúc).

questions.question: The committee recommended that the motion **______** **______** by the board of directors. (Giả định cách bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: recommend that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: The technical specifications, **______** **______** the lead engineer, detailed the system's inherent staticism. (Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ hoàn thành bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Hoàn thành bị động): which had been prepared $\to$ Having been prepared (nhấn mạnh sự chuẩn bị hoàn tất trước đó).

questions.question: It is crucial that the board **______** the full extent of the firm's financial liability. (Giả định cách chủ động - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: It is crucial that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** **______** the core principles of scientific method, the research was ultimately deemed null and void. (Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Bị động): Because the research was vitiated by $\to$ Vitiated by.

questions.question: The diplomat suggested that all contentious issues **______** **______** through diplomatic channels. (Giả định cách bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: suggest that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** **______** all necessary data, the analyst began the process of extrapolation. (Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ hoàn thành chủ động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành chủ động): After she had secured $\to$ Having secured.

questions.question: The old policy, **______** **______** an act of Parliament, was finally repealed. (Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): which was instituted by $\to$ instituted by.

questions.question: It is mandatory that every employee **______** the confidentiality agreement before gaining access. (Giả định cách chủ động - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: It is mandatory that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** **______** the gravity of the potential consequences, the firm issued an immediate retraction. (Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ chủ động - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because the firm considered $\to$ Considering.

questions.question: The committee decided that the draft **______** **______** to external parties under no circumstances. (Giả định cách bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: decide that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

_Note: ENGLISH IEL9.0 - Đảo ngữ nâng cao & Từ vựng
topic: Đảo ngữ  nâng cao & Từ vựng
subject: ENGLISH IEL9.0

questions.question: **______** has the company faced such a concerted external threat that the board called for an emergency meeting.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Rarely/Seldom: Rarely/Seldom + Aux + S + V. Cần Hiện tại hoàn thành ('has faced') nên chọn 'Rarely before has'.

questions.question: No sooner **______** the contentious policy **______** than the opposing political faction immediately voiced objections.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc No sooner... than: No sooner + had + S + V3/ed + than + S + V2/ed.

questions.question: **______** was the complexity of the data model that the entire project required an overhaul of the verification protocols.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ 'the complexity' (số ít) đi với 'was'.

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** the technical specifications **______** to unauthorized third parties.

options.a: should the technical specifications be disclosed
options.b: the technical specifications should be disclosed
options.c: should be disclosed the technical specifications

questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Under no circumstances: Should + S + V. Cần Bị động (be disclosed) vì 'technical specifications' không tự tiết lộ.

questions.question: Not only **______** the core argument, but they also presented new empirical evidence to buttress their claims.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not only: Not only + Aux + S + V. Cần Hiện tại hoàn thành ('have confirmed') vì sự kiện còn liên quan đến hiện tại ('presented new empirical evidence').

questions.question: Only after the contract was fully ratified **______** the CEO **______** to disclose the ethical breach.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only after: Only after + Clause + Aux + S + V1. Cần 'did' cho thì Quá khứ đơn (agree).

questions.question: **______** was the gravity of the diplomatic crisis that the envoy was recalled immediately for consultation.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ 'the gravity' (số ít) đi với 'was'.

questions.question: Little **______** the government **______** that the seemingly minor amendment would vitiate the entire law.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Little: Little + did + S + V1 (suspect).

questions.question: **______** had the scientist finalized the paper **______** her findings were immediately refuted by a rival lab.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Hardly/Barely/Scarcely... when/before: Barely + had + S + V3/ed + when + S + V2/ed.

questions.question: Never in the history of the corporation **______** such an egregious breach of fiduciary duty.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Never: Never + Aux + S + V. Cần Hiện tại hoàn thành ('has been') với chủ ngữ giả 'there'.

questions.question: **______** was the consensus on the new ethical guidelines that the vote was unanimous.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. 'strong' là tính từ đi với 'was'.

questions.question: Should the data prove inconclusive, **______** the entire experimental procedure from scratch.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 1 (Should): Mệnh đề chính không đảo ngữ: S + V.

questions.question: Only then **______** the full **______** of the economic disparity in the nation.

options.a: did the central bank grasp / magnitude
options.c: had the central bank grasped / gravity
options.d: did the central bank grasp / gravity

questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only then: Only then + Aux + S + V1. Collocation chuẩn: 'gravity/magnitude' (tầm quan trọng/mức độ nghiêm trọng).

questions.question: Rarely **______** the government **______** a policy with such speed and decisiveness.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Rarely: Rarely + Aux + S + V1. Hành động đã xảy ra trong quá khứ nên dùng Quá khứ đơn 'did... implement'.

questions.question: **______** the sheer number of dissenting votes that the committee decided to hold a second, unscheduled debate.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Such: Such + V + Noun Phrase. 'the sheer number' (số ít) nên cần 'was'.

questions.question: **______** the adverse market reaction that the company decided to delay its IPO indefinitely.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. S là 'the adverse market reaction' (số ít) nên cần 'was'.

questions.question: Not for a moment **______** the diplomat **______** the true implications of the draft resolution.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not for a moment: Not for a moment + Aux + S + V1. Cần 'did' (Quá khứ đơn).

questions.question: **______** the evidence to be deemed purely circumstantial, the prosecution would have to drop the charges.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 2 (Were): Were + S + to + V (hoặc danh từ/tính từ) $\to$ nghĩa là "If the evidence were...".

questions.question: Only by appealing to the highest court **______** the final ruling **______**.

options.a: the company could overturn / be overturned
options.b: could the final ruling be overturned
options.c: the final ruling could be overturned
options.d: could the company overturn the final ruling

questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only by: Only by + V-ing/Noun + Aux + S + V. Cần Bị động ('be overturned') vì 'final ruling' là vật.

questions.question: **______** the diplomat achieved rapprochement with the rival nation **______** he was immediately recalled for a new assignment.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Hardly/Barely/Scarcely... when/before: Hardly + had + S + V3/ed + when + S + V2/ed.

questions.question: Never before **______** the committee members shown such **______** support for the controversial proposal.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Never before: Never before + Aux + S + V3/ed. Collocation chuẩn: **vehement support** (ủng hộ mãnh liệt).

questions.question: In no other field **______** such a rigorous **______** of peer review and corroboration.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với In no other: In no other + Noun + Aux + S + V1. Collocation: **rigorous framework** (khuôn khổ nghiêm ngặt).

questions.question: **______** the politician's **______** that he failed to admit his error even when faced with incontrovertible evidence.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Such: Such + V + Noun Phrase. Collocation: **obduracy** (sự cứng đầu/ngoan cố).

questions.question: **______** was the **______** of the data model that external analysts deemed it impossible to ascertain its veracity.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. Collocation: **opaqueness** (tính mờ đục) đi với **intense** (mạnh mẽ/quá mức).

questions.question: Should the company breach the contractual **______**, the penalties will be immediately implemented.
questions.explanation: Collocation: **contractual provision** (điều khoản hợp đồng).

questions.question: Not until the full extent of the financial **______** was divulged **______** the public fully grasp the necessity of the bailout.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not until: Not until + Clause + Aux + S + V1. Collocation: **financial discrepancy** (mâu thuẫn tài chính).

questions.question: So insidious **______** the economic decline **______** that few realized the true gravity until the crash.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So... that: So + Adj + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ 'the economic decline' (số ít) đi với 'was'.

questions.question: **______** were the data inconsistencies that the entire study was deemed invalid and required immediate retraction.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ 'the data inconsistencies' (số nhiều) đi với 'were'.

questions.question: Never in my career **______** observed such a **______** disregard for established ethical guidelines.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Never: Never + Aux + S + V3/ed. Collocation: **egregious disregard** (sự coi thường trắng trợn/nghiêm trọng).

questions.question: Little **______** the historian **______** that his findings would completely **______** the established narrative.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Little: Little + did + S + V1. Collocation: **completely refute** (hoàn toàn bác bỏ).

questions.question: Only with irrefutable **______** **______** the court agree to **______** the ruling.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only: Only + giới từ/cụm từ + Aux + S + V1. Collocation: **irrefutable corroboration** (xác nhận không thể chối cãi) và **rescind the ruling** (hủy bỏ phán quyết).

questions.question: Hardly **______** the government **______** the tax cuts **______** when the currency immediately devalued.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Hardly/Barely/Scarcely... when/before: Hardly + had + S + V3/ed + when + S + V2/ed.

questions.question: **______** was the complexity of the philosophical concept **______** it required an entire chapter of elucidation.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Such: Such + V + Noun Phrase + that. Chủ ngữ 'the complexity' (số ít) đi với 'was'.

questions.question: Never before **______** such a high level of **______** in the financial markets.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Never before: Never before + Aux + S + V3/ed. Collocation: **high level of volatility** (mức độ biến động cao).

questions.question: Should the committee **______** a serious **______**, the entire process must be restarted.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 1 (Should): Should + S + V1. Collocation: **make a blunder** (mắc sai lầm lớn).

questions.question: **______** the sheer disparity in resource allocation that the proposal was immediately vetoed.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ 'the sheer disparity' (số ít) đi với 'was'.

questions.question: Not for a moment **______** the government **______** the full **______** of the public anger.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not for a moment: Not for a moment + Aux + S + V1. Collocation: **grasp the gravity** (nắm bắt mức độ nghiêm trọng).

questions.question: Only by rigorously applying the scientific method **______** the researchers **______** the spurious evidence.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only by: Only by + V-ing/Noun + Aux + S + V1. Cần 'could' (khả năng) và **eliminate the evidence** (loại bỏ bằng chứng).

questions.question: So entrenched **______** the bureaucratic **______** that the new regulatory framework proved entirely ineffective.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + V3/ed + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ 'the bureaucratic inertia' (số ít) đi với 'was'. Collocation: **bureaucratic inertia** (sự trì trệ hành chính).

questions.question: Were the **______** to be deemed purely **______**, the case would be dismissed due to lack of proof.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 2 (Were): Were + S + to + V. Collocation: **circumstantial evidence** (bằng chứng gián tiếp).

questions.question: Only after repeated public censure **______** the CEO **______** to resign. (Đảo ngữ với Only after - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Only after: did + S + V1.

questions.question: **______** was the philosopher's core argument that it required an entire monograph for elucidation. (Đảo ngữ với Such - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Such: Such + V + Noun Phrase + that. Chủ ngữ 'the philosopher's core argument' (số ít) nên dùng 'was'.

questions.question: Rarely **______** the diplomats **______** such extreme **______** in the face of international pressure. (Đảo ngữ với Rarely - 3 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Rarely: did + S + V1. Collocation: **display probity** (thể hiện tính trung thực).

questions.question: Not only **______** the committee **______** the treaty, but they also advocated for its immediate abrogation. (Đảo ngữ với Not only - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Not only: did + S + V1 (ratify).

questions.question: Were the company to face **______** **______**, the entire financial structure would collapse. (Đảo ngữ loại 2 - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 2: Were + S + to + V. Collocation: **mass litigation** (kiện tụng hàng loạt).

questions.question: **______** **______** the contentious amendment **______** the government immediately faced public backlash. (Đảo ngữ kép với Barely - 3 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Barely... when: Barely + had + S + V3/ed + when + S + V2/ed.

questions.question: Nowhere **______** been a more concerted effort to **______** the impact of climate change. (Đảo ngữ với Nowhere - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Nowhere: has there been. Collocation: **mitigate the impact** (giảm nhẹ tác động).

questions.question: So compelling **______** the evidence **______** that the jury reached a verdict in under an hour. (Đảo ngữ với So - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. Chủ ngữ 'the evidence' (số ít) nên dùng 'was'.

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** the employee **______** company assets without prior authorization. (Đảo ngữ kép với Under no circumstances - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Under no circumstances: must + S + V1. Collocation: **divest assets** (thoái vốn tài sản).

questions.question: Little **______** the activist **______** that the seemingly benign policy was fundamentally **______**. (Đảo ngữ với Little - 3 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với Little: did + S + V1. Collocation: **insidious policy** (chính sách ngấm ngầm/có hại).

_Note: ENGLISH IEL9.0 - Rút gọn Mệnh đề Nâng cao và Giả định cách Phức hợp.
topic: Rút gọn Mệnh đề Nâng cao và Giả định cách Phức hợp.
subject: ENGLISH IEL9.0

questions.question: **______** for several months, the economic report finally highlighted a significant discrepancy in the national debt figures.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành bị động): Because the report had been researched $\to$ Having been researched. Nhấn mạnh hành động bị động đã hoàn thành trước sự kiện chính.

questions.question: The CEO requested that the board **______** the proposed merger until the final audit is completed.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách (Subjunctive Mood) với động từ Requested: request that S + V (nguyên mẫu). 'Table' ở đây là động từ chủ động (hoãn lại).

questions.question: The scientific experiment, **______** meticulously under controlled conditions, failed to corroborate the initial hypothesis.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The experiment, (which was) conducted.

questions.question: It is essential that the diplomat **______** from making any inflammatory statements during the peace talks.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is essential that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the full gravity of the technical failure, the lead engineer issued an immediate apology to the stakeholders.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành chủ động): After he had realized $\to$ Having realized. Nhấn mạnh nhận thức xảy ra trước khi xin lỗi.

questions.question: The new legislation, **______** to mitigate social disparity, was criticized for its inherent opaqueness.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The legislation, (which was) designed.

questions.question: The panel urged that the witness **______** protected under the new federal whistleblower program.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Urged: urge that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** of all charges after the DNA evidence came to light, the individual sought to denigrate the prosecution in the press.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành bị động): After he had been exonerated $\to$ Having been exonerated.

questions.question: The research, **______** by a team of international scholars, offered an incisive critique of current fiscal policies.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The research, (which was) authored.

questions.question: It is mandatory that the corporation **______** its annual financial statements to the regulatory body by Friday.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is mandatory that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the contentious amendment, the parliament proceeded to debate the primary articles of the trade bill.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành chủ động): After they had tabled $\to$ Having tabled.

questions.question: The data, **______** through a series of rigorous empirical tests, provided irrefutable proof of market volatility.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The data, (which was) gathered.

questions.question: The diplomat proposed that a neutral third party **______** to adjudicate the territorial dispute.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Proposed: propose that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** by the public outcry, the government decided to rescind the unpopular tax increase.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Bị động): Because the government was influenced $\to$ Influenced.

questions.question: The ancient manuscript, **______** for centuries in a remote monastery, was finally elucidated by historians.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The manuscript, (which had been) hidden.

questions.question: It is desirable that the company **______** its redundant operations to improve long-term efficiency.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is desirable that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the economic repercussions, the central bank decided to hold interest rates steady.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Chủ động): As they considered $\to$ Considering.

questions.question: The artifacts, **______** to be of great antiquity, were immediately placed under high-security surveillance.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The artifacts, (which were) judged.

questions.question: The prosecutor insisted that the evidence **______** strictly confidential until the trial commences.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Insisted: insist that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the complexity of the philosophical concept, the professor spent three weeks on its elucidation.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc rút gọn: Given (Xét đến/Bởi vì có) + Danh từ.

questions.question: The technical glitch, **______** by a minor coding error, resulted in widespread system latency.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The glitch, (which was) caused.

questions.question: **______** all the relevant data, the analyst began to extrapolate the future market trends.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành chủ động): After he had analyzed $\to$ Having analyzed.

questions.question: The judge mandated that the corporation **______** the victims of the chemical spill immediately.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Mandated: mandate that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The report, **______** by the committee yesterday, contains several egregious factual errors.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The report, (which was) published.

questions.question: **______** by the sudden market crash, many investors were caught flat-footed and suffered heavy losses.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân/Bị động): Because they were alarmed $\to$ Alarmed.

questions.question: It is crucial that the lead scientist **______** the full extent of the experimental bias in her report.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is crucial that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The proposal, **______** by the board of directors, aims to buttress the firm's competitive advantage.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The proposal, (which was) supported.

questions.question: **______** a fragile consensus, the diplomats moved on to discuss the specifics of the trade agreement.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành chủ động): After they had forged $\to$ Having forged.

questions.question: The committee suggested that the current policy **______** to account for the new environmental standards.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Suggested: suggest that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** the true gravity of his actions, the politician offered his resignation in a brief statement.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because he realized $\to$ Realizing.

questions.question: The document, **______** by an anonymous source, revealed the extent of the corporate complicity.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The document, (which was) provided.

questions.question: **______** the project was no longer feasible, the board voted for its immediate cessation.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): As they determined $\to$ Determining.

questions.question: The doctor recommended that the patient **______** from all strenuous activity for at least two weeks.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Recommended: recommend that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The treaty, **______** after years of meticulous drafting, was finally ratified by both parliaments.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The treaty, (which was) prepared.

questions.question: **______** that the situation was volatile, the ambassador requested emergency security protocols.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because he knew $\to$ Knowing.

questions.question: It is imperative that the audit **______** the full magnitude of the financial discrepancy.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với tính từ It is imperative that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The evidence, **______** by a specialized forensic team, proved to be incontrovertible.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The evidence, (which was) analyzed.

questions.question: **______** their differences, the two factions agreed to a temporary ceasefire to allow for humanitarian aid.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành chủ động): After they had subsumed $\to$ Having subsumed.

questions.question: The board insisted that every employee **______** the updated code of conduct immediately.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách với động từ Insisted: insist that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The system, **______** by a sophisticated algorithm, is capable of detecting even subtle data anomalies.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): The system, (which is) governed.

questions.question: The committee suggested that the draft **______** **______** for further scrutiny before the next session. (Giả định cách bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: suggest that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** **______** the full extent of the market discrepancy, the analyst issued a stern warning. (Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ hoàn thành chủ động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ: After he had ascertained $\to$ Having ascertained.

questions.question: It is vital that every member **______** their allegiance to the new protocol. (Giả định cách chủ động - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: It is vital that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The report, **______** **______** by the lead researcher, detailed the inherent bias in the study. (Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ hoàn thành bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ: which had been authored $\to$ having been authored.

questions.question: The diplomat urged that the hostile rhetoric **______** **______** immediately. (Giả định cách bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: urge that S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** **______** from the final draft, the clause was later added as a proviso. (Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Bị động): Having been omitted $\to$ nhấn mạnh việc bị bỏ qua trước đó.

questions.question: The company requested that the tax authorities **______** the deadline for submission. (Giả định cách chủ động - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: request that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The artifact, **______** **______** in the ruins, provided a link to the archaic civilization. (Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (Bị động): which was discovered lately $\to$ discovered lately.

questions.question: **______** **______** the potential for social disintegration, the government implemented new welfare measures. (Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ chủ động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Chủ động): Having realized $\to$ nhấn mạnh nhận thức hoàn tất.

questions.question: It is mandatory that the witness **______** the truth without any prevarication. (Giả định cách chủ động - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Giả định cách: It is mandatory that S + V (nguyên mẫu).

_Note: ENGLISH IEL9.0 - Tổng hợp các cấu trúc C1/C2
topic: Tổng hợp các cấu trúc C1/C2
subject: ENGLISH IEL9.0

questions.question: **______** such a severe economic downturn that the government was forced to seek an international bailout.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ với So: So + Adj + V + S + that. S là "economic downturn" (số ít) nên dùng "was".

questions.question: The board recommended that the CEO **______** all personal interests in competing firms to avoid any conflict.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách (Subjunctive Mood) với động từ "Recommend": S + recommend + that + S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the findings of the previous study, the researchers decided to adopt a more rigorous methodology.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ nhấn mạnh hành động xảy ra trước: After they had questioned -> Having questioned.

questions.question: Only after the witness was granted immunity **______** to provide the incontrovertible evidence.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Only after": Only after + Clause + Aux + S + V.

questions.question: It is imperative that the laboratory protocols **______** strictly adhered to by all technicians.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách với "It is imperative that": S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: The report, **______** by the discrepancy in the data, was eventually retracted by the academic journal.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The report, (which was) vitiated by...

questions.question: **______** had the merger been announced when the stock market reacted with extreme volatility.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc đảo ngữ: Scarcely + had + S + V3/ed + when + S + V2/ed.

questions.question: The diplomat insisted that the two rival nations **______** a framework for rapprochement immediately.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách với động từ "Insist": S + insist + that + S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** the full gravity of the situation, the envoy offered his resignation in a terse statement.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Nguyên nhân): Because he realized -> Realizing.

questions.question: Rarely **______** observed such an egregious breach of safety protocols in a high-security facility.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Rarely": Rarely + Aux + S + V. Hiện tại hoàn thành phù hợp để nhấn mạnh trải nghiệm.

questions.question: The committee suggested that the draft legislation **______** for further scrutiny before being ratified.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách với "Suggest": S + suggest + that + S + be + V3/ed (bị động).

questions.question: **______** of all legal liability, the former director was free to pursue new commercial ventures.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề nhấn mạnh hành động bị động đã hoàn tất trước đó: After he had been exonerated.

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** the confidentiality agreement be violated by any employee.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Under no circumstances": Aux + S + V. "Should" dùng để nhấn mạnh nghĩa vụ/cấm đoán.

questions.question: The evidence, **______** by a team of forensic experts, proved to be entirely incontrovertible.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The evidence, (which was) analyzed...

questions.question: **______** was the complexity of the data model that even the lead analyst struggled to ascertain its veracity.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Such": Such + be + Noun Phrase + that.

questions.question: It is vital that the diplomat **______** the host country's cultural sensitivities during the negotiation.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách với "It is vital that": S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** by the lack of transparency, the shareholders demanded a comprehensive audit of the firm.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Bị động/Nguyên nhân): Because they were alarmed -> Alarmed.

questions.question: Not for a moment **______** the politician suspect that his private communication would be divulged.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Not for a moment": Aux + S + V. Thì quá khứ đơn (did) phù hợp ngữ cảnh.

questions.question: The proposal, **______** by the board of directors, aims to facilitate greater international cooperation.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động): The proposal, (which was) endorsed...

questions.question: **______** the economic repercussions, the central bank decided to defer the decision on interest rates.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Chủ động): As they considered -> Considering.

questions.question: Never before **______** such a high level of economic disparity in the history of the region.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Never before": Aux + S + V.

questions.question: The judge mandated that the defendant **______** the full amount of damages within thirty days.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách với "Mandate": S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** a fragile consensus, the delegates proceeded to draft the final articles of the treaty.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề nhấn mạnh hành động hoàn tất trước đó: After they had forged -> Having forged.

questions.question: So pervasive **______** the data inconsistencies that the entire study was deemed invalid.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "So": So + Adj + V + S. Chủ ngữ "data inconsistencies" (số nhiều) -> "were".

questions.question: The document, **______** by a single ambiguous clause, required immediate amendment by the legal team.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động).

questions.question: It is desirable that every employee **______** the updated code of conduct before the end of the fiscal year.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách với "It is desirable that".

questions.question: **______** from the political discourse, the sensitive issue was finally addressed by the committee.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Hoàn thành bị động).

questions.question: No sooner **______** the policy been implemented than it faced massive public backlash.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc No sooner had... than...

questions.question: The research, **______** by an independent panel, confirmed the inherent bias in the original data set.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động).

questions.question: **______** the potential for social disintegration, the government implemented new welfare measures.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn nhấn mạnh việc nhận thức đầy đủ trước khi hành động: Having realized.

questions.question: Little **______** the developers know that their algorithm would later be used for malicious purposes.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Little": Little did S + V.

questions.question: The board requested that the financial records **______** available for public scrutiny.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách (bị động) với "Request".

questions.question: **______** the economic situation, the analyst warned of an impending crisis.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Chủ động).

questions.question: Only by presenting empirical data **______** to substantiate your claims to the board.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Only by": can you hope.

questions.question: The system, **______** by a minor glitch, resulted in significant data latency.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động).

questions.question: It is crucial that the lead scientist **______** the full extent of the experimental bias.
questions.explanation: Giả định cách với "It is crucial that".

questions.question: **______** by the findings, the committee issued an immediate admonition to the firm.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ (Bị động).

questions.question: Nowhere in the historical record **______** a clearer instance of diplomatic failure.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Nowhere".

questions.question: The artifacts, **______** in a remote monastery, provided links to an archaic civilization.
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ (bị động).

questions.question: Should the evidence be deemed circumstantial, **______** the case without delay.
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ loại 1 (Should) ở vế If, vế chính giữ nguyên trật tự từ.

questions.question: Not only **______** the government **______** the proposal, but they also introduced severe sanctions. (Đảo ngữ - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ với "Not only": did + S + V.

questions.question: **______** **______** the full magnitude of the error, the CEO issued a public apology. (Rút gọn hoàn thành chủ động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Nhấn mạnh hành động nhận thức đã hoàn tất: Having realized.

questions.question: It is mandatory that every participant **______** the confidentiality agreement. (Giả định cách - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: The technical glitches, **______** **______** by the update, caused widespread system latency. (Rút gọn bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ bị động: caused by / having been caused by.

questions.question: **______** had the scientist finalized the results **______** the data was corroborated by a rival lab. (Đảo ngữ kép - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc Scarcely/Barely/Hardly... when.

questions.question: The diplomat urged that the hostile rhetoric **______** immediately to prevent escalation. (Giả định cách - 1 từ)
questions.explanation: S + V (nguyên mẫu).

questions.question: **______** **______** of his innocence, the individual sought to denigrate the prosecution. (Rút gọn hoàn thành bị động - 2 từ)
questions.answer: Having been exonerated / Exonerated having been
questions.explanation: After he had been exonerated -> Having been exonerated.

questions.question: So immense **______** the gravity of the situation **______** the envoy was recalled. (Đảo ngữ với So - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: So + Adj + be + S + that.

questions.question: Little **______** the analyst **______** that the market was about to crash. (Đảo ngữ với Little - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: Đảo ngữ: Little + did + S + V.

questions.question: It is essential that the data **______** **______** transparently to the public. (Giả định cách bị động - 2 từ)
questions.explanation: be + V3/ed.

questions.question: **______** the diplomat’s attempt to **make amends for** his previous inflammatory remarks, the negotiations remained at a deadlock.
questions.explanation: "Notwithstanding" (Mặc cho) là giới từ C1 dùng trong văn phong học thuật để rút gọn mệnh đề nhượng bộ. Collocation: "make amends for" (đền bù/chuộc lỗi).

questions.question: The board of directors demanded that the management **______** the plan to **phase out** the redundant manufacturing units.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood với "Demand". Phrasal verb: "phase out" (loại bỏ dần dần).

questions.question: **______** the gravity of the situation, the CEO decided to **come clean about** the financial discrepancies.
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ chỉ nguyên nhân, nhấn mạnh hành động nhận thức xong mới hành động. Collocation: "come clean about" (thú nhận).

questions.question: Not only **______** to **crack down on** tax evasion, but the government also introduced new transparency laws.
questions.explanation: Inversion với "Not only". Phrasal verb: "crack down on" (thắt chặt/áp chế).

questions.question: It is crucial that the lead scientist **______** any evidence that might **call into question** the validity of the study.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. C1 Collocation: "call into question" (nghi ngờ/đặt dấu hỏi).

questions.question: The policy, **______** to **bridge the gap** between different social classes, was ultimately deemed a failure.
questions.explanation: Reduced relative clause (passive). C1 Collocation: "bridge the gap" (thu hẹp khoảng cách).

questions.question: **______** had the company **embarked on** the restructuring plan than it faced a series of mass litigations.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc No sooner had... than. Phrasal verb: "embark on" (bắt đầu thực hiện).

questions.question: The auditor suggested that the firm **______** more rigorous measures to **keep track of** offshore transactions.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Collocation: "keep track of" (theo dõi).

questions.question: **______** from the official archives, the document was only **brought to light** by an investigative journalist.
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle (Passive). C1 Collocation: "bring to light" (đưa ra ánh sáng).

questions.question: Seldom **______** an opportunity to **make a name for** oneself in such a competitive academic field.
questions.explanation: Inversion với "Seldom". Collocation: "make a name for oneself" (tạo dựng tên tuổi).

questions.question: It is imperative that the government **______** immediate steps to **stave off** a potential banking crisis.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verb: "stave off" (ngăn chặn/đẩy lùi).

questions.question: The researcher, **______** to **fathom out** the complex molecular structure, spent years in the laboratory.
questions.explanation: Reduced relative clause (active). Phrasal verb: "fathom out" (tìm hiểu kỹ/hiểu thấu).

questions.question: **______** the proposal would **fall short of** the required standards, the committee rejected it outright.
questions.explanation: Reduced adverbial clause of reason. Collocation: "fall short of" (không đạt tới).

questions.question: Only by **______** a concerted effort can the team hope to **get the better of** their competitors.
questions.explanation: "Only by + V-ing". Collocation: "get the better of" (vượt qua/thắng được).

questions.question: The diplomat urged that the two sides **______** their differences to **pave the way for** peace.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. C1 Collocation: "pave the way for" (mở đường cho).

questions.question: **______** by the constant delays, the investors finally decided to **pull out of** the project.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (passive/feeling). Phrasal verb: "pull out of" (rút khỏi).

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** we **lose sight of** our primary objective: long-term sustainability.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Collocation: "lose sight of" (quên mất/mất dấu).

questions.question: The artifacts, **______** to **bear testimony to** the region's rich history, were heavily guarded.
questions.explanation: Reduced relative clause. C1 Collocation: "bear testimony to" (là minh chứng cho).

questions.question: **______** the data, the analyst managed to **iron out** the discrepancies in the final report.
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle. Phrasal verb: "iron out" (giải quyết/loại bỏ khó khăn).

questions.question: The board insisted that every member **______** from any activity that might **bring the company into disrepute**.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. C1 Collocation: "bring into disrepute" (làm mất uy tín).

questions.question: **______** the high cost, the new technology is expected to **pay dividends** in the long run.
questions.explanation: C1 prepositional use. Collocation: "pay dividends" (mang lại lợi ích/kết quả tốt).

questions.question: The CEO requested that the legal department **______** the contract to **weed out** any ambiguous clauses.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verb: "weed out" (loại bỏ thứ không tốt).

questions.question: **______** that the market was saturated, the firm decided to **branch out into** renewable energy.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause. Phrasal verb: "branch out into" (mở rộng sang lĩnh vực mới).

questions.question: Not only **______** the target, but they also managed to **set a new record** for productivity.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Collocation: "set a record".

questions.question: It is vital that the witness **______** the events exactly as they **unfolded**.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. C1 Verb: "unfold" (diễn ra/tiết lộ).

questions.question: The project, **______** to **cater for** the needs of the elderly, received widespread praise.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause. Phrasal verb: "cater for" (phục vụ nhu cầu).

questions.question: **______** had the new law been passed when people began to **voice their grievances** in public.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Collocation: "voice grievances" (bày tỏ lời phàn nàn).

questions.question: The committee suggested that we **______** the meeting until we can **reach a consensus**.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Collocation: "reach a consensus".

questions.question: **______** from the team, the player decided to **take up** coaching instead.
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle (Passive). Phrasal verb: "take up" (bắt đầu một công việc/sở thích).

questions.question: Seldom **______** such a brilliant strategy be **put into practice** so effectively.
questions.explanation: Inversion with modals. Collocation: "put into practice" (đưa vào thực tiễn).

questions.question: It is desirable that the company **______** a policy to **keep pace with** technological advancements.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Collocation: "keep pace with" (theo kịp).

questions.question: The report, **______** to **shed light on** the cause of the crash, was finally released.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause. C1 Collocation: "shed light on" (làm sáng tỏ).

questions.question: **______** that the situation was hopeless, they decided to **call it a day**.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause. Idiom: "call it a day" (ngừng làm việc).

questions.question: Only after **______** the costs did they realize the project would **run into debt**.
questions.explanation: Preposition + V-ing. Collocation: "run into debt" (mắc nợ).

questions.question: The professor insisted that the students **______** the logic behind the theory before trying to **apply it**.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Master the logic.

questions.question: **______** by the sudden change in weather, the climbers had to **turn back**.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (passive). Phrasal verb: "turn back" (quay lại).

questions.question: Under no circumstances **______** you **give way to** their unreasonable demands.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Phrasal verb: "give way to" (nhượng bộ).

questions.question: The study, **______** to **prove the contrary**, actually supported the original hypothesis.
questions.explanation: Reduced relative clause (active intent).

questions.question: **______** for hours, the delegates finally **came to an agreement**.
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle. Collocation: "come to an agreement".

questions.question: Never before **______** such a high-stakes decision been **left to chance**.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Collocation: "leave something to chance".

questions.question: Only by **______** **______** the facts can we hope to **______** a solution. (Only by + Phrasal Verb + Verb - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Phrasal verb: "dig into" (tìm hiểu kỹ). Collocation: "reach a solution".

questions.question: It is essential that the manager **______** **______** for the mistake and **______** amends. (Subjunctive + Collocations - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Collocations: "take responsibility", "make amends".

questions.question: **______** **______** **______** the truth, the journalist decided to publish the story. (Reduced clause + Phrasal verb - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle. Phrasal verb: "find out" (phát hiện).

questions.question: Not only **______** the CEO **______** to the terms, but he also **______** the lead. (Inversion + Collocations - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Inversion with "did". Collocation: "take the lead" (dẫn đầu).

questions.question: The policy, **______** **______** **______** poverty, has had a limited impact. (Reduced clause + Collocation - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Reduced relative clause (passive). Collocation: "alleviate poverty" (giảm nghèo).

questions.question: **______** had the storm **______** than the power lines **______** down. (Inversion No sooner - 3 words)
questions.explanation: No sooner had + S + V3 than + S + V2.

questions.question: It is vital that we **______** **______** with the latest trends to **______** competitive. (Subjunctive + Collocations - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verb: "keep up with". Collocation: "stay competitive".

questions.question: **______** **______** **______** of his duties, the employee was dismissed. (Reduced clause + Collocation - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle (Passive). Collocation: "find someone derelict of duty".

questions.question: Little **______** the scientist **______** that his invention would **______** the world. (Inversion Little - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Inversion with "did". Academic verb: "revolutionize".

questions.question: Should the plan **______** **______**, we will have to **______** a new strategy. (Inversion type 1 + Phrasal verb/Collocation - 3 words)
questions.explanation: Phrasal verb: "fall through" (thất bại). Collocation: "devise a strategy" (nghĩ ra chiến lược).

_Note: ENGLISH IEL9.0 - Phrasal Verbs 3 thành phần và Giả định cách trong các cấu trúc phức hợp.
topic: Phrasal Verbs 3 thành phần và Giả định cách trong các cấu trúc phức hợp.
subject: ENGLISH IEL9.0

questions.question: The committee suggested that the department **______** ways to **make up for** the lost time during the initial phase of the project.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood với "Suggest". Phrasal verb: "make up for" (bù đắp cho).

questions.question: **______** the escalating costs, the board insisted that the firm **______** its plan to expand into the Asian market.
questions.explanation: "Given" dùng để rút gọn mệnh đề trạng ngữ chỉ lý do. Vế sau dùng Subjunctive Mood với "Insist".

questions.question: Not only did the manager **______** his promise, but he also refused to **______** the complaints from the staff.

options.b: go through with / look up to
options.c: go down with / look forward to
options.d: go along with / look out for

questions.explanation: Inversion với "Not only". Phrasal verbs: "go back on" (thất hứa) và "look into" (điều tra/xem xét).

questions.question: It is imperative that we **______** the traditional methods and **______** more sustainable energy sources.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "do away with" (bãi bỏ/loại bỏ) và "go for" (chọn/thực hiện).

questions.question: **______** for the technical errors, the company requested that the software update **______** immediately.
questions.explanation: Perfect Participle (Passive) rút gọn mệnh đề. Vế sau là Subjunctive Mood (Passive) với "Request".

questions.question: Rarely has the CEO **______** such harsh criticism without trying to **______** the responsibility.

options.b: come down with / brush up on

questions.explanation: Inversion với "Rarely". Phrasal verbs: "come in for" (hứng chịu chỉ trích) và "brush aside" (phớt lờ/bỏ qua).

questions.question: The judge mandated that the corporation **______** the environmental damage it had **______**.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "compensate for" (bồi thường) và "brought about" (gây ra).

questions.question: **______** that the project was unfeasible, the team decided to **______** the contract.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (active). Phrasal verb: "back out of" (rút khỏi/nuốt lời).

questions.question: It is vital that you **______** the latest regulations and **______** any suspicious activity.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verb: "keep up with" (theo kịp/cập nhật).

questions.question: Only by **______** the situation can we hope to **______** a viable solution.

options.a: facing up to / come up with
options.c: facing away from / come out with

questions.explanation: "Only by + V-ing". Phrasal verbs: "face up to" (đối mặt chấp nhận) và "come up with" (nghĩ ra).

questions.question: The diplomat proposed that the two nations **______** the hostile rhetoric to **______** peace.

options.a: put an end to / bring about

questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "put an end to" (chấm dứt) và "bring about" (mang lại).

questions.question: **______** from the position, the manager struggled to **______** his peers.

options.a: Having been removed / keep pace with
options.d: To be removed / keep away from

questions.explanation: Perfect Participle (Passive). Phrasal verb: "keep pace with" (theo kịp).

questions.question: Under no circumstances should we **______** the rules just to **______** our competitors.

options.b: cut down on / get along with

questions.explanation: Inversion. Idiom: "cut corners" (làm tắt/đốt cháy giai đoạn). Phrasal verb: "get ahead of" (vượt lên trước).

questions.question: The report suggested that the firm **______** more funds to **______** the research.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "set aside" (dành riêng ra) và "carry out" (thực hiện).

questions.question: **______** with the new evidence, the lawyer requested that the trial **______**.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (passive). Subjunctive Mood (Passive) với "Request".

questions.question: Little did the scientist know that his discovery would **______** so many ethical questions.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Phrasal verb: "give rise to" (gây ra/dẫn đến).

questions.question: It is essential that we **______** the unnecessary expenses to **______** our budget.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "cut down on" (cắt giảm) và "stick to" (tuân thủ/giữ đúng).

questions.question: **______** by the lack of support, the researcher decided to **______** his position.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (passive/feeling). Phrasal verb: "walk away from" (rời bỏ).

questions.question: Rarely do we **______** such a talented individual who can **______** complex problems so easily.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Phrasal verbs: "run into" (tình cờ gặp) và "work out" (giải quyết).

questions.question: The committee insisted that the candidate **______** all the criteria before being **______** the short-list.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verb: "put on" (đưa vào danh sách).

questions.question: **______** all the options, we decided to **______** the original plan.

options.a: Having gone through / fall back on

questions.explanation: Perfect Participle. Phrasal verbs: "go through" (xem xét kỹ) và "fall back on" (phải dùng đến phương án dự phòng).

questions.question: It is desirable that the government **______** a way to **______** the economic gap.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. C1 Collocation: "bridge the gap" (thu hẹp khoảng cách).

questions.question: **______** for the role, the actor had to **______** the character's accent.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (active). Phrasal verb: "pick up" (học lỏm/bắt chước nhanh).

questions.question: Not until we **______** the truth did we realize he had **______** us.
questions.explanation: Inversion với "Not until". Phrasal verbs: "found out" (phát hiện) và "lead on" (lừa dối/dẫn dắt sai).

questions.question: It is crucial that the witness **______** the statement and not **______** any details.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "stand by" (giữ vững/ủng hộ) và "leave out" (bỏ sót).

questions.question: **______** from the project, she had to **______** her team members.

options.a: Having been sidelined / hand over to
options.d: To be sidelined / hand back to

questions.explanation: Perfect Participle (Passive). Phrasal verb: "hand over to" (bàn giao cho).

questions.question: Under no circumstances can we **______** the quality of the product just to **______** costs.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Phrasal verbs: "compromise on" (thỏa hiệp/làm giảm chất lượng) và "keep down" (giữ ở mức thấp).

questions.question: The CEO urged that the staff **______** new ideas to **______** the competition.

options.a: come up with / keep ahead of
options.b: come out with / keep up with
options.c: come down with / keep out of
options.d: come along with / keep away from

questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "come up with" (nghĩ ra) và "keep ahead of" (dẫn trước/vượt xa).

questions.question: **______** by the sudden demand, the factory had to **______** production.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (passive). Phrasal verb: "step up" (tăng cường).

questions.question: Seldom has the company **______** a situation where they had to **______** their words.
questions.explanation: Inversion. Phrasal verb: "go back on" (nuốt lời).

questions.question: It is imperative that the investigators **______** the files to **______** any evidence.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verbs: "look through" (xem lướt qua/soát) và "turn up" (tìm ra/xuất hiện).

questions.question: **______** the difficulty, the team managed to **______** the task.
questions.explanation: C1 preposition. Phrasal verb: "carry out" (thực hiện).

questions.question: **______** that he was wrong, he decided to **______** his resignation.
questions.explanation: Reduced clause (active). Phrasal verb: "hand in" (nộp).

questions.question: Only after **______** his mistakes did he **______** his behavior.
questions.explanation: Preposition + V-ing. Phrasal verb: "account for" (giải thích cho).

questions.question: The board requested that the firm **______** its investment to **______** future risks.
questions.explanation: Subjunctive Mood. Phrasal verb: "guard against" (phòng ngừa).
